name: civicai
description: GenAI-powered civic platform: government services access, public issue reporting, and an AI companion.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix server && npm run lint --prefix client
